Get custom Automotive Banners from Banners.com! Automotive Banners can be used to advertise your business by providing your company name, business hours and contact information. Vinyl Banners can also be used to promote sales events, like tire sales, oil change specials, car washes, trade-in specials, new car sales events and more!

Custom Automotive Banners for Car Dealerships & Auto Service Centers

Durable Vinyl Automotive Banners - Order Custom Vehicle Advertising Online

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (Height x Width) Quantity Material Options Finishing Options Production Time Design Method PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Automotive Banners for Car Dealership & Auto Service Advertising

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your automotive business with eye-catching custom automotive banners designed for car dealerships, auto service centers, and vehicle advertising. From showroom displays and service bay promotions to outdoor car lot advertising, our professionally designed automotive banners help increase your visibility and drive customer traffic to your automotive business.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver automotive banners that you're proud to display at your dealership or service center. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your automotive advertising vision to reality. Our automotive banners are perfect for promoting tire sales, oil change specials, car washes, trade-in promotions, new car sales events, financing offers, and seasonal automotive services.

We offer automotive banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', with unlimited design options through our online designer. All automotive banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers to your automotive business.

Six Customizable Automotive Banner Materials

Your automotive banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art equipment for vibrant colors that withstand outdoor automotive environments. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your automotive banner needs to be precise, please contact customer service.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Automotive Banner Materials for Outdoor Car Dealership Display

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular automotive banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut, perfect for professional automotive advertising displays.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics ideal for eye-catching automotive promotions.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest automotive banner material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability in harsh automotive environments.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh automotive banners are ideal for outdoor car lot conditions and windy environments.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor automotive showroom displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end professional look.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for automotive applications, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive specifically designed for automotive surfaces and low energy applications.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Automotive Banner Installation

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all automotive banners to increase durability in outdoor car dealership environments.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for automotive banner installation:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for automotive banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the automotive banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the automotive banner for professional pole mounting.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your automotive banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for automotive banner installations and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the automotive banner for long-term outdoor car lot display.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided automotive banners up to 150 square feet. Larger automotive banner sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in automotive banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Automotive Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for your automotive banner project. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your automotive advertising timeline, our production times range from one to five business days.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight for automotive promotions. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent automotive banner needs.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day for your automotive banner project, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for automotive advertising campaigns.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for automotive banners. Free and speedy for most custom automotive banner orders.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush for your automotive banner, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option for planned automotive promotions.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for automotive banners. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Automotive Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All automotive banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards for automotive banner orders. We also accept checks, which must be received before your automotive banner order is put into production.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your automotive banner order.

For more information on check orders for automotive banners, see this article on our blog.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Automotive Banner Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping your automotive banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your automotive banner order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your automotive banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices for automotive banners are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large automotive banner orders.

After automotive banner products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the automotive banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments of automotive banners, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Methods Available for Automotive Banners:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

We print thousands of automotive banners each year for car dealerships, auto service centers, and vehicle-related businesses. Explore popular ways our customers use automotive banners for their automotive advertising needs.

Car Dealerships and Auto Sales

  • New car sales event promotions
  • Trade-in special advertising
  • Financing offer displays

Automotive Events and Shows

  • Auto auction advertising

Auto Parts and Accessories

  • Accessory installation services

  • Aftermarket equipment promotions
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Custom Automotive Banner Printing

The file that prints best for automotive banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files for automotive banner projects. If you are unsure of the quality of your automotive banner files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs for Automotive Banners

If you would like to double-check your automotive banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your automotive banner proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your automotive banner order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System for Automotive Banners

If your automotive banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific automotive banner project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Automotive Banners Online Today

Did we answer all your questions about automotive banners?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your automotive banner project.

Looking for something more specific for your automotive business? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special automotive projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity automotive banner orders.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color automotive banners take your car dealership or auto service center to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability for automotive environments. Start your automotive banner design today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Automotive Banners

What material works best for outdoor automotive banners?

For outdoor car dealership and auto service center applications, we recommend 13 oz or 18 oz vinyl materials. The 18 oz vinyl provides extra durability for harsh automotive environments, while mesh banners work well in windy car lot conditions.

Can I use automotive banners for both indoor and outdoor advertising?

Yes, our automotive banner materials are versatile. Vinyl materials work excellent for both indoor showroom displays and outdoor car lot advertising. Fabric banners are ideal for indoor automotive showrooms and provide a premium appearance.

What sizes work best for automotive banner advertising?

Popular automotive banner sizes include 3'x8', 4'x8', and 4'x12' for car lot displays. Larger sizes like 5'x15' or 6'x20' work well for major automotive promotions. We can create automotive banners up to 8'x50'.

How long do automotive banners last outdoors?

When properly installed and maintained, automotive vinyl banners typically last 2-3 years outdoors. The 18 oz vinyl material provides the longest lifespan for automotive applications in harsh weather conditions.

Can you help design automotive banners for my car dealership?

Yes, our professional graphic designers specialize in automotive banner design. We can create custom automotive banners featuring your dealership branding, promotional offers, and automotive-specific messaging.

What finishing options work best for automotive banner installation?

For car lot installations, we recommend hems and grommets for easy mounting on fence posts or poles. Reinforced corners and hems provide extra durability for automotive banners in high-traffic areas.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
